description: Introducing the CR7 Forever Worldwide NFT Collection, highlighting its significance and connection to Saudi Arabia. The collection aims to celebrate various cities, stadiums, and moments in football history, emphasizing the global reach of Binance's offerings.
topic_summary: Overview of the CR7 Forever Worldwide NFT Collection and its ties to Saudi Arabia, featuring key elements from the launch event [t=2:72] and the collection's global impact [t=22:80].
